mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE house_no = #{houseNo} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE city = #{city} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE city = #{city} AND district = #{district} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_house SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_house SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_house SET favorite_count = favorite_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND favorite_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND is_deleted = #{deleted}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = #{deleted}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE audit_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE is_deleted = #{deleted}
SELECT district as region, COUNT(*) as count FROM biz_house WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY district

SELECT IF(total > 0, ROUND(rented * 100.0 / total), 0) as rent_rate FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rented, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (0, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total FROM biz_house WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ) as t
